'''zhagopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatromedicine|iatromedicine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatromedicine|iatromedicine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhagopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhægepeth|zhægepeth]] || [[word:zhægepej|zhægepej]] || [[word:zhægepesh|zhægepesh]] || [[word:zhægepe|zhægepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhagogopoth|zhagogopoth]] || [[word:zhagogopoj|zhagogopoj]] || [[word:zhagogoposh|zhagogoposh]] || [[word:zhagogopo|zhagogopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhagopoth|zhagopoth]] || [[word:zhagopoj|zhagopoj]] || [[word:zhagoposh|zhagoposh]] || [[word:zhagopo|zhagopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhagofpoth|zhagofpoth]] || [[word:zhagofpoj|zhagofpoj]] || [[word:zhagofposh|zhagofposh]] || [[word:zhagofpof|zhagofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhagopotho|zhagopotho]] || [[word:zhagopojo|zhagopojo]] || [[word:zhagoposho|zhagoposho]] || [[word:zhagopoko|zhagopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhagopoth|zhagopoth]] || [[word:zhagopoj|zhagopoj]] || [[word:zhagoposh|zhagoposh]] || [[word:zhagopo|zhagopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhagopothol|zhagopothol]] || [[word:zhagopojol|zhagopojol]] || [[word:zhagoposhol|zhagoposhol]] || [[word:zhagopokol|zhagopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhagopothotho|zhagopothotho]] || [[word:zhagopojojo|zhagopojojo]] || [[word:zhagoposhosho|zhagoposhosho]] || [[word:zhagopoko|zhagopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhagopothon|zhagopothon]] || [[word:zhagopojon|zhagopojon]] || [[word:zhagoposhon|zhagoposhon]] || [[word:zhagopokon|zhagopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhagopothoro|zhagopothoro]] || [[word:zhagopojoro|zhagopojoro]] || [[word:zhagoposhoro|zhagoposhoro]] || [[word:zhagopokoro|zhagopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
